author: lOrm
content: SKIP — fix site is the `max_retries = 3u32` constant at `src/pipeline.rs:370` and the retry loop at `src/pipeline.rs:369-396`. `src/pipeline.rs` is in the agent's FORBIDDEN file list for this batch, so this issue cannot be addressed from this work-session. `grep -rn 'max_retries' src/` confirms there is no out-of-pipeline retry constant to redirect; the lift to 10 (CC parity) must be applied directly to the pipeline.rs constant in a future session with that file unlocked.
